parameters.query:
WITH due AS (
  SELECT j.id
  FROM email_sequence_jobs j
  JOIN leads l ON l.id = j.lead_id
  JOIN email_templates t ON t.template_key = j.template_key
  WHERE j.status = 'pending'
    AND j.scheduled_at <= NOW()
    AND t.is_active = TRUE
    AND (
      j.sequence_key = 'no_payment_bounce'
      OR (j.sequence_key <> 'no_payment_bounce' AND l.status = 'paid')
    )
  ORDER BY j.scheduled_at ASC, j.id ASC
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
  LIMIT 100
)
UPDATE email_sequence_jobs j
SET
  status = 'processing',
  attempts = j.attempts + 1,
  updated_at = NOW()
FROM due, leads l, email_templates t
WHERE j.id = due.id
  AND l.id = j.lead_id
  AND t.template_key = j.template_key
RETURNING
  j.id AS job_id,
  j.lead_id,
  j.email,
  j.template_key,
  j.sequence_key,
  j.attempts,
  j.metadata,
  l.name,
  l.status AS lead_status,
  l.payment_date,
  l.checkout_url,
  l.paddle_transaction_id,
  l.user_profile,
  l.program_plan,
  t.subject AS template_subject,
  t.html AS template_html,
  t.requires_pdf;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ name: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.name, week_number: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.week_number, week_plan: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.week_plan, profile: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.profile, calendar_url: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.calendar_url }) }}

={{ ({ from: $env.RESEND_FROM, to: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.email, subject: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.email_subject, html: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.email_html, attachments: [{ filename: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.attachment_filename, content: $json.pdf }] }) }}
={{ ({ from: $env.RESEND_FROM, to: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.email, subject: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.email_subject, html: $('Build Job Payload').item.json.email_html }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH updated_job AS (
  UPDATE email_sequence_jobs
  SET
    status = 'sent',
    sent_at = NOW(),
    last_error = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = $1
    AND status = 'processing'
  RETURNING lead_id, template_key
)
UPDATE leads l
SET
  week2_sent_at = CASE WHEN uj.template_key = 'week_2' THEN NOW() ELSE l.week2_sent_at END,
  week3_sent_at = CASE WHEN uj.template_key = 'week_3' THEN NOW() ELSE l.week3_sent_at END,
  week4_sent_at = CASE WHEN uj.template_key = 'week_4' THEN NOW() ELSE l.week4_sent_at END,
  next_send_at = CASE
    WHEN uj.template_key = 'week_2' THEN NOW() + interval '7 days'
    WHEN uj.template_key = 'week_3' THEN NOW() + interval '7 days'
    WHEN uj.template_key = 'week_4' THEN NULL
    ELSE l.next_send_at
  END,
  completed_at = CASE WHEN uj.template_key = 'upsell_day_30' THEN NOW() ELSE l.completed_at END,
  status = CASE WHEN uj.template_key = 'upsell_day_30' THEN 'completed' ELSE l.status END,
  updated_at = NOW()
FROM updated_job uj
WHERE l.id = uj.lead_id;

UPDATE email_sequence_jobs
SET
  status = CASE WHEN attempts >= 3 THEN 'failed' ELSE 'pending' END,
  last_error = LEFT($2, 2000),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
  AND status = 'processing';

UPDATE email_sequence_jobs
SET
  status = 'skipped',
  updated_at = NOW(),
  metadata = metadata || jsonb_build_object('skip_reason', 'lead_already_paid')
WHERE id = $1
  AND status = 'processing'
RETURNING id, status;
